english translation text: KEHTI THI YEH MAA KHOON BHARI MAYYAT SE LIPAT KARThe mother of Ali Akber (a.s) lamented at his body covered with blood!English Transliteration

urdu transliteration text:
KEHTI THI YEH MAA KHOON BHARI MAYYAT SE LIPAT KARHAYE HAYE ALI AKBAR HAYE HAYE ALI AKBAR
@HujjatELC
english translation text:
The mother of Ali Akber (a.s) lamented at his body covered with blood!
Oh Ali Akber!, Oh Ali Akber!

Just wait and let me offer a prayer to prolong your life, and take away your calamities.
May this mother be sacrificed for you

At least wait so I can dress you as a groom,
So I may show your sister a glance of you all adorned,
Your sister is restless for this.

I brought you up for 18 years into the prime of youth
And now you are bathed in blood,
What is the point of my existence from now on?

urdu transliteration text:
maa teri judaai may bhala kaise jiyegimaar jaayegi sughra jo khabar teri sunegiab kya karoon jeekar haay haay ali akbar
Upon hearing this news, your sister (Sugra) will die
Oh Ali Akbar! Oh Ali Akbar!
@HujjatELC
english translation text:
How will your mother live without you?
Your sister is already unwell,

When the oppressors came to loot us in the tents,
Your mother called out for you: oh Ali Akbar, oh Ali Akbar!
Our chadar (hijab) will be forcibly taken away,
